---
name: 🚀 New Benchmark Submission
about: Submit a new ASP benchmark to the Potassco collection.
title: "[Benchmark]: <Name of your benchmark>"
labels: "contribution, pending-review"
assignees: ''

---

Note: Don't worry if you can't fill out every field! Just give us the essentials (Name, Type, and a way to access the files) and we can help fill in the blanks later.

### 🏷️ Benchmark Name
> [e.g., Sudoku, Blocksworld Planning, Nurse Timetabling]

### 📖 Description
> [Brief 1-2 sentence description of the problem domain and what the encoding aims to solve.]

### ⚙️ Technical Details
* **Type:** [e.g., Decision, Optimization, Multi-shot, Interactive]
* **Format:** [e.g., aspif, ASP-Core-2, clingo, DLV, DIMACS]
* **Tested With:** [e.g., clingo 5.7.1, alpha 2.1]

### 📊 Instances
* **Generation:** [Manual, Automatic, Real-world data, Unknown]
* **Details:** [e.g., 100 automated instances ranging from 10 to 500 nodes]

### 🔒 Data & Access (Confidentiality)
* **Status:** [Public / Private (Restricted) / Embargoed]
* **License:** [e.g., MIT, CC-BY 4.0, or Proprietary/Ask Contact]
* **Sensitivity:** [Does the data contain real-world information requiring anonymization?]

### 🔗 Source & Literature
* **Repository/ZIP:** [Link to GitHub, Zenodo, or attached file]
* **Generator URL:** [If applicable, link to the script used to generate instances]
* **Reference:** [DOI, URL, or citation for the paper introducing this benchmark]

### 👤 Contact
* **Name:** [Primary contact person]
* **Email:** [Contact email]

### 💡 Miscellaneous
* **Complexity:** [Known complexity class, if any]
* **Metadata:** [Is there a JSON/CSV with instance properties available?]
* **Other Notes:** [e.g., required solver flags, specific grounding constraints]

---
**Submission Agreement:**
- [ ] I confirm that I have the right to share this benchmark (or its metadata) under the specified license.
- [ ] I understand this will be indexed in the Potassco Benchmark Collection.
